summary: A review artifact suggests the acquisition conversion dashboard may be treated as a source of truth by mistake.

evidence.excerpt: Review queue item references dashboard behavior as evidence, not accepted truth.

drift.was: Accepted ontology remains canonical through git and validator.

drift.reason: MCP/GBrain access must keep accepted resources separate from review resources.

review.reason: Source-of-truth boundary changes require systems owner review.
